stateDiagram

%% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
%% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
state "." as ROOT.(InitialState)

SPLASH

SPLASH : SPLASH

SPLASH : enter / #123; splashCount_ms = 0#59; #125;

SPLASH : 1. do / #123; splashCount_ms++#59; #125;

HOME

HOME : HOME

HOME : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

MAIN_MENU

MAIN_MENU : MAIN_MENU

MAIN_MENU : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

SECONDARY_MENU

SECONDARY_MENU : SECONDARY_MENU

SECONDARY_MENU : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

CALIBRATE_RX_IQ

CALIBRATE_RX_IQ : CALIBRATE_RX_IQ

CALIBRATE_RX_IQ : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

UPDATE

UPDATE : UPDATE

UPDATE : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

FREQ_ENTRY

FREQ_ENTRY : FREQ_ENTRY

FREQ_ENTRY : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

CALIBRATE_FREQUENCY

CALIBRATE_FREQUENCY : CALIBRATE_FREQUENCY

CALIBRATE_FREQUENCY : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

CALIBRATE_POWER

CALIBRATE_POWER : CALIBRATE_POWER

CALIBRATE_POWER : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

CALIBRATE_TX_IQ

CALIBRATE_TX_IQ : CALIBRATE_TX_IQ

CALIBRATE_TX_IQ : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

EQUALIZER

EQUALIZER : EQUALIZER

EQUALIZER : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

BIT

BIT : BIT

BIT : enter / #123; clearScreen = true#59; #125;

ROOT.(InitialState) --> SPLASH

SPLASH --> HOME : do [splashCount_ms >= splashDuration_ms]

HOME --> MAIN_MENU : MENU

HOME --> CALIBRATE_RX_IQ : CALIBRATE_RX_IQ

HOME --> FREQ_ENTRY : DFE

HOME --> CALIBRATE_TX_IQ : CALIBRATE_TX_IQ

HOME --> CALIBRATE_FREQUENCY : CALIBRATE_FREQUENCY

HOME --> CALIBRATE_POWER : CALIBRATE_POWER

HOME --> EQUALIZER : EQUALIZER

HOME --> BIT : BIT

MAIN_MENU --> HOME : HOME

MAIN_MENU --> SECONDARY_MENU : SELECT

SECONDARY_MENU --> HOME : HOME

SECONDARY_MENU --> UPDATE : SELECT

CALIBRATE_RX_IQ --> HOME : HOME

UPDATE --> HOME : HOME

UPDATE --> HOME : SELECT

FREQ_ENTRY --> HOME : HOME

CALIBRATE_FREQUENCY --> HOME : HOME

CALIBRATE_POWER --> HOME : HOME

CALIBRATE_TX_IQ --> HOME : HOME

EQUALIZER --> HOME : HOME

BIT --> HOME : HOME
Events
settings
